name: Bath & Body Works, Inc. (Part of L Brands)
lede: BBW runs two capability centers in Bengaluru. Bengaluru, covering gbs and gcc/gic, built over thirteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one BBW office in India. We map two, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: BBW GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: BBW runs 2 verified GCC centers in Bengaluru, covering gbs and gcc/gic. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: BBW's India footprint covers Bengaluru, spanning gbs and gcc/gic. The centers deliver IT for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all one decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does BBW operate in India?
faq.a: BBW operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does BBW have GCC centers in?
faq.a: BBW's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does BBW run in India?
faq.a: BBW runs gbs and gcc/gic centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at BBW's India GCCs?
faq.a: BBW's India centers employ in the 501 to 1,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads BBW's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 1 leaders at BBW's India centers. Names and contact details open with a free account.
